steps.title: Find the relationship the passage explains
steps.content: The passage asks why ocelots purr and jaguars roar, then hypothesizes that the hyoid bone structure difference explains this behavioral difference. The main idea is the causal link between structure and vocalization.

steps.title: Apply the relationship to the choices
steps.content: D directly states that hyoid differences explain the purr-roar difference. A selects only the structural detail without explaining what it reveals; B falsely portrays researchers as uncertain when they hypothesize an explanation; C addresses only the roar side. That matches choice D — D is correct.
